mapper.update: /* TM_PN60001_Dao_saveCerIssList */ MERGE INTO tm_pn60001 A USING ( SELECT #{ecsElcpwstnDivCd} AS ecs_elcpwstn_div_cd, #{cerDelngDivNm} AS cer_delng_div_nm, #{cerMntrngStrtYm} AS cer_mntrng_strt_ym, #{cerMntrngEndYm} AS cer_mntrng_end_ym, #{cerAmt} AS cer_amt, #{cerIssQy} AS cer_iss_qy, #{rmCtnt} AS rm_ctnt, #{frstRgstrId} AS frst_rgstr_id, #{lastUpdusrId} AS last_updusr_id, #{updtRsn} AS updt_rsn FROM DUAL ) B ON ( A.ecs_elcpwstn_div_cd = B.ecs_elcpwstn_div_cd AND A.cer_delng_div_nm = B.cer_delng_div_nm ) WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET A.cer_mntrng_strt_ym = B.cer_mntrng_strt_ym, A.cer_mntrng_end_ym = B.cer_mntrng_end_ym, A.cer_amt = B.cer_amt, A.cer_iss_qy = B.cer_iss_qy, A.rm_ctnt = B.rm_ctnt, A.last_updt_dt = SYSDATE, A.last_updusr_id = B.last_updusr_id, A.updt_rsn = B.updt_rsn WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT ( A.ecs_elcpwstn_div_cd, A.cer_delng_div_nm, A.cer_mntrng_strt_ym, A.cer_mntrng_end_ym, A.cer_amt, A.cer_iss_qy, A.rm_ctnt, A.frst_regist_dt, A.frst_rgstr_id, A.last_updt_dt, A.last_updusr_id, A.updt_rsn ) VALUES ( B.ecs_elcpwstn_div_cd, B.cer_delng_div_nm, B.cer_mntrng_strt_ym, B.cer_mntrng_end_ym, B.cer_amt, B.cer_iss_qy, B.rm_ctnt, SYSDATE, B.frst_rgstr_id, SYSDATE, B.last_updusr_id, B.updt_rsn )
